notes: v340 — THE 📊 RANGE COLUMN IS BACK. You were right — the Range column had gone missing (and the table “didn't flow” because of the gap). The cause: a responsive rule that trims columns when the table is a touch too wide for the screen was hiding columns by their position number, and those position numbers were set before the Range column ever existed. When Range was added (between Change and Vol Surge), every column shifted along by one — so the rule started quietly hiding Range instead of the column it was meant to trim. Fixed: the Range column is never hidden now (the table simply scrolls sideways if it's wide), and the phone layout was corrected too so Range stays visible there. So you'll see 📊 Range again — each share's recent trading band, where the price sits inside it (0% = floor, 100% = ceiling), a stability dot, and the “▼ near low · research” / “▲ near high” flags — with the little window selector in the header to switch between 3 days and 3 months. Hard-refresh to load v340. ALSO RECENT — v339 — ↩ Undo now sticks: restored positions are no longer instantly re-sold by your rules. ALSO RECENT — v338 — Undo auto-sells added, and the share row was tidied (News + Technicals moved into 🔬 Deep dive). ALSO RECENT — v337 — fixed the app freezing / running slow on a big market. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
